title: cedrela toona var. australis
intro: Cedrela toona var. australis, also known as Australian Toona, is a variant of the Cedrela toona tree native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Cedrela toona var. australis include its potential to alleviate fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
